Terms of Service

Please read these terms carefully

Last Updated: January 1, 2026

Welcome to the website of Summit Roof Pros ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"). By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website or services.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing our website, submitting a form, requesting an estimate, or otherwise using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use our website and services.

2. Services Description

Summit Roof Pros provides roofing services in Denver, CO and surrounding areas. Our website provides information about our services, allows you to request free estimates, and facilitates communication with our team.

All service descriptions, project examples, and related content on our website are for informational purposes only and do not constitute a binding offer or guarantee of specific results.

3. Estimates and Pricing

Estimates provided by Summit Roof Pros are offered free of charge and are intended as approximate projections based on the information available at the time. Please be aware of the following:

  • All estimates are non-binding and subject to change after on-site inspection.
  • Final pricing may vary based on actual project scope, materials, site conditions, and other factors discovered during inspection or work.
  • An estimate does not create a contractual obligation for either party.
  • A separate written contract or agreement will govern the terms of any work performed.
  • We reserve the right to decline any project at our discretion.

4. Communication Consent

By submitting a form on our website, calling us, or otherwise providing your contact information, you consent to receive communications from Summit Roof Pros. These communications may include:

  • Phone calls and text messages regarding your inquiry or estimate
  • Appointment confirmations and reminders
  • Follow-up communications about our services
  • Promotional offers and service updates

You may opt out of communications at any time. See our Privacy Policy for full details on SMS/text message consent.

5. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, photographs, videos, and software, is the property of Summit Roof Pros or its content suppliers and is protected by United States and international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works from, publicly display, or exploit any content from our website without prior written consent from Summit Roof Pros.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Summit Roof Pros and its owners, officers, employees, agents, and affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with:

  • Your use of or inability to use our website or services
  • Any errors or omissions in website content
  • Any unauthorized access to or use of our servers or personal information
  • Any interruption or cessation of transmission to or from our website

Our total liability for any claims arising under these terms shall not exceed the amount paid by you, if any, for accessing our website.

7. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Summit Roof Pros, its owners, officers, employees, agents, and affiliates from and against any and all claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or related to:

  • Your use of our website or services
  • Your violation of these Terms of Service
  • Your violation of any rights of a third party
  • Any content you submit or transmit through our website

8. Governing Law

These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of CO, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any legal action or proceeding arising under these terms shall be brought exclusively in the courts located in CO, and you consent to the jurisdiction of such courts.

9. Dispute Resolution

In the event of any dispute, claim, or controversy arising out of or relating to these Terms of Service, the parties agree to first attempt to resolve the matter through good-faith negotiation. If the dispute cannot be resolved through negotiation within thirty (30) days, either party may pursue resolution through binding arbitration or the courts as described in Section 8 above.

10. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms of Service at any time without prior notice. Changes become effective immediately upon posting to this page. Your continued use of our website after any modifications constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

11. Contact Information

If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

Summit Roof Pros

Phone: (303) 555-0199

Summit Roof Pros

Trusted roofing serving Denver, CO and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
